animationFrame.description: A single frame within an animation layer

target.description: Animation state identifier. For base avatars and wearables, use the well-known directional targets: walk-south, walk-north, walk-east, walk-west, sit-south, sit-north, sit-east, sit-west, hold-south, hold-north, hold-east, hold-west, push-south, push-north, push-east, push-west, pickup-south, pickup-north, pickup-east, pickup-west, and dance. Frame count and frame rate are defined per layer — authors choose their own animation detail level. For items, this is the variant name.

layerName.description: The display name of the layer

frameRate.description: The frame rate in milliseconds per frame

zIndex.description: Draw order relative to the entity. 0 = behind (default), 1 = in front. For furniture this allows parts like armrests to draw over the avatar.

colorChannel.description: Optional color channel name for tint customization. Layers sharing the same channel name are tinted together. When present, the user can customize the tint color for this channel. When omitted, the layer is not user-customizable.

channelTint.description: A tint for a color channel. All animation layers sharing the same colorChannel name are tinted together.

channel.description: The color channel name. Must match a colorChannel value on one or more animation layers.

tint.description: Hex color to tint the channel (e.g. '#cc4444'). Must be a '#' followed by 3 or 6 hex digits.

movementAttribute.description: A named attribute with a value from 0–200 representing –100 to +100 (shifted positive). Used on critters and items to express attraction/repulsion to tile-emitted signals.

stateProperty.description: Declares a named, typed state property on an entity. Behaviors read these values via entityState at runtime.

name.description: Property name used as the state key.

type.description: Value type. Controls editor widget and serialisation.

default.description: Default value (as a string). Omit for blob properties.

allowOverride.description: When true, this property can be overridden on placement (room item) or equip (avatar wearable). Defaults to false.

stateValue.description: A concrete value for a declared state property. Provide either value (for non-blob types) or blob (for blob type).

name.description: Must match a stateProperty name on the entity.

code.description: Inline Lua source code. Mutually exclusive with codeBlob.

codeBlob.description: Lua source code stored as a blob. Mutually exclusive with code.
